description: Researcher has paper subdirectories for Sparse Attention/, State Space Models/, Mixture of Experts/. New paper (Hyena) doesn't cleanly fit any of them — agent must decide whether to extend an existing genre or create a new one. Either is acceptable as long as it lands under Resources/Papers/.

input.content: Read Hyena Hierarchy paper today. Subquadratic with implicit long convolutions, complementary to Mamba. Probably doesn't fit cleanly in either Sparse Attention/ or State Space Models/ — it's its own family.
